HomePage.title: Explore theses
HomePage.subtitle: Propositions whose confidence changes as evidence arrives.
HomePage.engineError: Could not reach the engine. Is it running?

ThesisPage.communityStale: votes may not reflect recent evidence

CreateThesisPage.title: Contend a thesis
CreateThesisPage.subtitle: State your position. Define what would prove you wrong.
CreateThesisPage.titlePlaceholder: State your thesis clearly and directly.
CreateThesisPage.summaryPlaceholder: One or two sentences. What is the core claim?
CreateThesisPage.descriptionPlaceholder: The full argument — context, reasoning, caveats.
CreateThesisPage.confidenceHelp: Your honest assessment before the evidence runs. This is recorded as your stated position, not an AI estimate.
CreateThesisPage.expiresHelp: Leave blank for open-ended theses. Set a date for predictions with a natural end point — e.g. a sporting event, an election.
CreateThesisPage.criteriaCallout: A thesis can only be as good as the criteria you test it by.
CreateThesisPage.criteriaHelp: Define what would support your thesis, what would falsify it, and what signals to monitor. Be specific — a vague criterion is an untestable one.
CreateThesisPage.criterionDescriptionPlaceholder: What is the specific, observable condition?
CreateThesisPage.errorGeneric: Could not save the thesis. Is the engine running?
CreateThesisPage.requiresAuth: You need to be signed in to contend a thesis.
